overall.description: Gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima featuring a samurai character exploring the Cloud Forest Temple. The character ascends stone stairs through a lush forest, enters a temple complex with traditional Japanese architecture, explores a water garden with stone statues, and proceeds into a misty mountain graveyard.

agents.ego_description: climbing weathered stone stairs toward the temple complex at the top of the hill

entered.detail: weathered stone steps ascending through the forest
large gray rock formation with dappled tree shadows
tall green deciduous trees surrounding the path
traditional curved black temple roof visible at the summit

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a steep stone stairway carved into the mountainside, flanked by dense forest on the left and rocky cliffs on the right. Sunlight filters through the canopy, illuminating the path toward the distant temple roof visible at the top of the stairs.

events.description: location text 'CLOUD FOREST TEMPLE' appears as character enters the temple plaza
passing villagers and wooden merchant stalls in the sunny courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking through the temple courtyard past NPCs and wooden structures

notable_agents.action: villager standing near wooden stall with fabric canopy
villager sitting by the water edge

entered.detail: large traditional wooden temple with curved black roof and hanging paper lanterns
traditional stone lantern with glowing golden light
wooden market stall with beige fabric canopy

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairs into the Cloud Forest Temple plaza, the character walks through a sunlit courtyard with the main temple hall ahead. Villagers stand near wooden stalls, and stone lanterns mark the sacred grounds.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow water garden with rock carvings

events.description: character steps into shallow water entering the garden pool area
passing stone Buddha statues carved into the ivy-covered rock wall

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow water past stone statues and worshippers

notable_agents.action: person sitting in the water near the stone statues

entered.detail: calm reflective water with lily pads covering the surface
multiple white stone Buddha statues against the rock wall
rock face completely covered in green ivy and foliage

segments.scene_description: The character enters a serene water garden, wading through shallow pools while passing stone Buddha statues set against an ivy-covered rock wall. The temple building remains visible to the left as the water reflects the surrounding greenery.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple side path with wooden railings

events.description: exits water and returns to dry stone path
moving into shadow under the temple overhang

agents.ego_description: circling around the temple structure along the stone walkway

notable_agents.action: villager walking along the temple path

entered.detail: dark wooden railing along the elevated temple porch
cobblestone path with patches of sunlight and shadow

segments.scene_description: Leaving the water garden, the character walks along a cobblestone path beside the temple, passing under wooden railings and through alternating patches of sunlight and shadow cast by the temple overhang.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty mountain trail with memorial stones

events.description: entering thick fog with significantly reduced visibility
passing traditional stone memorial lanterns along the mountain path

agents.ego_description: walking into the misty mountain path leaving the temple behind

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail disappearing into white fog
low wooden fence lining the right side of the path
stacked stone lanterns marking the mountain trail

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the temple behind and enters a narrow mountain trail enveloped in thick white fog. Stone memorial lanterns line the path, which is bordered by a low wooden fence on the right.

events.description: entering graveyard area with numerous stone grave markers
character slows while passing NPC near wooden structure

agents.ego_description: walking through the foggy graveyard past stone monuments and markers

notable_agents.action: villager standing near wooden building looking at grave markers

entered.detail: numerous stone grave markers and monuments arranged in rows
small wooden structure with stone foundation

segments.scene_description: The path opens into a foggy graveyard filled with stone grave markers. The character walks past rows of monuments toward a small wooden shrine building, where a villager stands observing the graves.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a sun-drenched mountain ascent into the ethereal, fog-shrouded silence of a hillside graveyard. It begins with the character climbing a steep stone stairway carved into a cliffside, where sunlight filters through a dense forest canopy toward a distant temple roof. As the climb ends, the scene opens into a bright temple plaza filled with wooden stalls and stone lanterns before shifting into a serene water garden where the character wades past Buddha statues and ivy-covered walls. The camera then follows a cobblestone path through alternating patches of light and shadow beside the temple buildings, eventually leaving the architecture behind to enter a narrow trail enveloped in thick white fog. Finally, the path expands into a misty graveyard lined with stone memorial lanterns and grave markers, leading toward a small wooden shrine and a solitary observer.
